l:dependency.name: GitLab Branch Source Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: GitLab Provides branch source and folder organisation functionality for GitLab Repositories in Jenkins Source Plugin

l:dependency.name: Script Security Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Allows Jenkins administrators to control what in-process scripts can be run by less-privileged users.

l:dependency.name: Java Servlet API
l:dependency.l:description: Java.net - The Source for Java Technology Collaboration

l:dependency.name: Joda-Time
l:dependency.l:description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

l:dependency.name: Handy URI Templates
l:dependency.l:description: Handy URI Templates is a RFC6570 compliant URI template processor. The library allows clients to utilize templatized URIs and inject replacement variables to expand the template into a URI. The library sports a fluent API, ability to plugin custom object renderers, and supports all levels of URI templates.

l:dependency.name: Folders Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: This plugin allows users to create "folders" to organize jobs. Users can define custom taxonomies (like by project type, organization type etc). Folders are nestable and you can define views within folders. Maintained by CloudBees, Inc.
